decision_commentary: Completeness 5: all required fields present — submitted_at (2026-12-26), jurisdiction ('Municipio de La Paz, BCS + COFEPRIS Delegación Baja California Sur'), status='approved', corrections array (2 items, both resolved=true), approved_at (2027-06-02). Jurisdiction is specific — names both the municipal authority and the COFEPRIS delegación with state specified. Accuracy 5: jurisdiction matches project location (La Paz, BCS — correct). submitted_at (2026-12-26) is after DG-11 contractor selection (2026-12-01) — correct timing. Two corrections received and both resolved — realistic COFEPRIS correction scenario (setback dimensions correction from municipal; medical gas zone valve diagram from COFEPRIS — both technically accurate and plausible). approved_at populated with status='approved' — consistent. Clarity 5: Vera can trigger construction phase start immediately from this document — status='approved', all corrections resolved. Three permits obtained listed explicitly: Licencia de Construcción, Licencia Sanitaria (COFEPRIS), and Autorización de Sistemas de Gases Medicinales. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: submitted promptly after DG-11 contractor selection; approved within 23 weeks (Phase 6 duration). Auto-fail: jurisdiction specific — PASS; submitted_at present — PASS; corrections array present — PASS; approved_at consistent with status='approved' — PASS; submitted after DG-11 — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia gate for permit-status. Paco fires after Vera activation from DG-11.
